payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial crop showing a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and a narrow vertical frame/stile at the right; smooth satin finish with slight sheen, no visible knob or hardware in the visible area, and a piece of cloth or paper overlapping the upper-left corner; appears to be approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.
